generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our NATO allies have been consistently falling short on their defense spending commitments? While we're doing our part to keep the world safe, others are leaving us to bear the burden. It's time we rethink our approach to alliance commitment and ensure fairness for American taxpayers. #NationalSecurity #FairShare
